ExternalDatabaseInfo.CreateViewSql:
SELECT count(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.survey_arrange_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE NULL::integer
        END) AS "調査_手配待ち件数",
    count(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.survey_arrange_pending_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE NULL::integer
        END) AS "調査_手配保留件数",
    count(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.survey_consent_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE NULL::integer
        END) AS "調査_承諾待ち件数",
    count(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.survey_result_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE NULL::integer
        END) AS "調査_結果待ち件数",
    count(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.survey_complete_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE NULL::integer
        END) AS "調査_完了待ち件数"
   FROM (t_object_survey main
     JOIN m_survey_status sub ON ((main.survey_status_id = sub.survey_status_id)))
  WHERE ((EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM t_object_order
          WHERE ((t_object_order.object_order_id = main.object_order_id) AND (t_object_order.active_flg = 1)))) AND ((sub.survey_arrange_wait_flg = 1) OR (sub.survey_arrange_pending_flg = 1) OR (sub.survey_consent_wait_flg = 1) OR (sub.survey_result_wait_flg = 1) OR (sub.survey_complete_wait_flg = 1)));
